---
name: 🚀 aesthera-delivery
description: "Use when: executing the full delivery pipeline for an Aesthera feature; taking a GitHub issue from spec to implemented, tested, documented, and reviewed code; orchestrating spec-tecnica, aesthera-implementador, test-guardian, and code-reviewer in sequence for a specific issue; running the SDD (Spec-Driven Development) delivery cycle."
tools: [read, search, 'github/*', todo, agent]
model: Claude Sonnet 4.6
argument-hint: "Informe o número da issue do GitHub a ser entregue. O pipeline guiará todo o ciclo: spec técnica → refinamento → implementação → checklist → testes → documentação → revisão."
---

Antes de executar qualquer tarefa, leia e siga integralmente:

`ai-engineering/prompts/aesthera-delivery-pipeline/aesthera-delivery-pipeline-prompt.md`
